steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with the given formula:
$$
s^2=\frac{HN}{r}
$$
Multiply both sides by $r$ to clear the denominator:
$$
rs^2=HN
$$

steps.title: Isolate the tension
steps.content: Divide both sides by $H$: $$ \frac{rs^2}{H}=N $$ So $N=\frac{rs^2}{H}$. The answer is A.
